species: The spliceosome is a staggeringly complex machine comprising, in humans, 5 snRNAs and >150 proteins.
cell_type: Beusch et al. use base editing to interrogate the human spliceosome in haploid cells.
disease_state: Recent work has identified SUGP1 as a putative tumor suppressor...
sample_source: We first generated a monoclonal cell line expressing FNLS, a cytosine base editor, in an eHAP haploid cell background.
cell_line: We first generated a monoclonal cell line expressing FNLS, a cytosine base editor, in an eHAP haploid cell background.
